 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.8","title":"Implement: clipboard integration (copy/paste) for frankenterm-web","description":"Goal
- Implement copy and paste behaviors expected from a modern terminal.

Acceptance Criteria
- Copy uses selection model; paste injects as input stream.
- Works across Chrome/Safari/Firefox within their security constraints.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:24.704918895Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:24.704918895Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.8","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:24.704918895Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.8","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:24.704918895Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.8","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:24.704918895Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.9","title":"Implement: IME/composition support (CJK input)","description":"Goal
- Provide high-quality text input beyond raw key events.

Acceptance Criteria
- Composition events do not corrupt terminal state.
- Works with common IMEs (macOS, Windows, Linux).
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:29.229709842Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:29.229709842Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.9","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:29.229709842Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.9","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:29.229709842Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.3","title":"ftui-web: compile ftui to WASM and run inside FrankenTerm","description":"Scope
- Compile ftui (core/render/layout/style/text/widgets/runtime + demo) to wasm and run inside FrankenTerm surface.
- Replace terminal polling with a step-based, JS-driven event loop.

Deliverables
- New `ftui-web` crate exposing a `WasmApp` API: new, input, resize, tick, render.
- Minimal web harness that runs ftui-demo-showcase fully client-side.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:49:24.446759480Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:49:24.446759480Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:49:24.446759480Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.3.1","title":"Implement: new crate ftui-web (WASM API surface + glue)","description":"Goal
- Add `crates/ftui-web` exposing a minimal embedding API for running ftui models in WASM.

API Sketch
- `WasmApp::new(opts)`
- `resize(cols, rows)`
- `input(event_bytes or semantic event)`
- `tick(dt)`
- `render() -> Patch or Frame`

Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo check -p ftui-web --target wasm32-unknown-unknown` succeeds.

API Sketch
- `WasmApp::new(opts)`
- `resize(cols, rows)`
- `input(event_bytes or semantic event)`

- `render() -> Patch or Frame`

Acceptance Criteria

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.3.10","title":"Docs: embedding ftui-web + frankenterm-web into frankentui_website","description":"Goal
- Provide exact integration instructions for the Next.js site (bun) to consume the wasm artifacts.

Acceptance Criteria
- Clear build steps, file locations, and runtime initialization.
- No reliance on xterm.js.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:57.912485837Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:57.912485837Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:57.912485837Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:57.912485837Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:57.912485837Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.3.2","title":"Refactor: runtime backend abstraction (no direct Crossterm usage)","description":"Goal
- Introduce a backend abstraction so ftui-runtime can run on:
  - native tty backend (custom)
  - wasm backend (JS-driven)

Acceptance Criteria
- `Program` no longer owns a concrete `TerminalSession` tied to Crossterm.
- Backends provide: size, input events (or bytes), present output (or patches), and mode toggles.
- Old code paths removed after migration (no lingering shims).
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:05.372051512Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:48:21.671846794Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T19:48:21.671827719Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:05.372051512Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:05.372051512Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1008,"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"PinkElk picking this up - refactoring runtime to use Backend trait","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:37:03Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.3.3","title":"Build: make ftui core crates wasm32-friendly (cfg gates, no unix-only deps)","description":"Goal
- Ensure the ftui crates required for demos compile for `wasm32-unknown-unknown`.

Scope
- Remove / cfg-gate: signal handling, raw mode, threads, std::process usage.
- Ensure deterministic time sources can be injected.

Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo check --workspace --target wasm32-unknown-unknown` succeeds for the relevant crate set.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:10.884122826Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:10.884122826Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:10.884122826Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:53:10.884122826Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
